properties.Observation: A Well is constructed(1.3 m Dia. & 2m Hight). A Well Located on public land. Used for drinking and bathing
properties.Description:
"Construction of a Wall 1.2 m Long and 1.1 m High and Concrete the Pavement around the Well
Site preparation & setting out
Earth excavation for foundation or quarry  materials and haul the surplus materials up to 30m by Manually.
150mm x 225mm Random Rubble masonry work in 1:5 cement and sand mortar in structures
Plaster 12mm thick in 1:3 cement and sand finished smooth with gray cement floating
1:3:6 (40mm) concrete with concrete mixer  (volume batching)
Tidying up
Contingencies (10%)"
